view.title: Validate explicit UC need #2
view.subtitle: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for 'No permanent event type clutter' is satisfied as evidenced by the system's behavior.

blocks.title: Uc Need Validate 2 completed
blocks.message: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for 'No permanent event type clutter' is satisfied as evidenced by the system's behavior.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step successfully validates the requirement by confirming that the system generates a temporary link for a one-off meeting, which automatically expires after the meeting completes. This is evidenced by the scenario described in the linked use case, where a temporary link is generated (biz.ing/abc123-expires-24h) and is set to expire after the meeting. Additionally, the booking details confirm that the meeting is scheduled and the link's expiration behavior is implied by the system's design, thus ensuring no permanent event type is created.
